node.statement: COHERENT-LIFT-001: In a finite constant-coordinate coherent refinement system with maps E_nm satisfying E_nn=I and E_ml E_nm=E_nl for n<=m<=l, the finite logical-lift maps L_nm(O)=E_nm O E_nm^dagger are identity on equal scales and compose coherently: L_nn(O)=O and L_ml(L_nm(O))=L_nl(O). Lean proves this generic finite matrix statement in Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/CoherentSystem.lean; Julia and WolframScript check exact rational rotation examples. The result formalises only finite matrix coherence of logical lifts, sourced by `summary.tex` §4.4 inductive system equations ([[def:indlim]] direct-system) and the logical lift equations; it does not construct a completed direct-limit Hilbert space, continuum field algebra, categorical fine-graining system, or nonconstant growing Hilbert spaces.
